title: cupressaceae
intro: The Cupressaceae rank refers to the family of plants, which is the second-highest taxonomic rank after the order in plant classification. Cupressaceae is a family of coniferous plants that includes cedars, cypresses, and junipers, known for their scale-like leaves and conical shape. This family is characterized by its diversity of species, which are found in various parts of the world, including tropical and temperate regions. With over 130 species, Cupressaceae is one of the largest and most widespread plant families.
